name: Container Stack Deployment
description: Deploy Docker Compose stack with registry, services, and persistent volumes
prompts: List container registries in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to verify registry {{REGISTRY_0_ID}} is available
Deploy a simple Docker Compose stack in project {{PROJECT_ID}} with hello-world service
List all deployed stacks in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to verify the deployment succeeded
Check the status of all containers in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to ensure they're running
List all persistent volumes in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to verify data storage is mounted correctly
